name: American Financial Solutions
description_short: Nonprofit credit counseling agency offering debt management plans, credit counseling, and housing guidance. NFCC-certified with 500K+ clients served since 1999.
description_long:
American Financial Solutions (AFS) is a nonprofit credit counseling organization that has operated since 1999, positioning itself as a trusted resource for consumers struggling with debt and credit challenges. The organization claims to have helped over 500,000 clients manage more than $10 billion in debt while maintaining a 98% client satisfaction rating.

AFS offers a comprehensive suite of debt and credit services including debt management plans (DMPs) that consolidate payments into a single monthly obligation with negotiated lower interest rates and fees. Beyond DMPs, they provide certified credit counseling, student loan counseling, bankruptcy pre-filing and post-discharge counseling (approved by the Executive Office of the U.S. Trustees), credit report reviews, housing counseling for mortgage readiness, and foreclosure prevention assistance. All services are delivered by certified counselors through confidential consultations.

The organization distinguishes itself through nonprofit status, EOUST approval for bankruptcy counseling, longevity in the industry (since 1999), and a stated commitment to serving consumers and the community. They offer free educational resources including a blog, online classes, calculators, and targeted budgeting tools. Their website emphasizes accessibility with a toll-free number (888-282-5899) and multilingual support (Spanish).

As a nonprofit credit counseling agency, AFS operates in the legitimate free-help space. However, the website content is marketing-focused and limited regarding specific program details, fee structures, success metrics, or independent verification of their 98% satisfaction claim. While their EOUST approval for bankruptcy counseling is verifiable through official records, the depth of available information about other services and their actual outcomes is limited to claims made on their own website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Nonprofit status with no profit motive aligns counselor interests with client outcomes
Approved by Executive Office of U.S. Trustees (EOUST) for bankruptcy counseling services
Certified credit counselors conduct comprehensive financial reviews and credit report analysis
Debt management plans promise 3-5 year payoff with lower interest rates and single monthly payment
Free educational resources including online classes, blog, calculators, and budgeting tools
Multilingual support (Spanish) and accessible via toll-free number and online login portal
Established track record operating since 1999 with claimed 500K+ clients served
cons: Website does not disclose specific fees, if any, for debt management plans or counseling services
No independent verification provided for claimed 98% satisfaction rating or $10 billion debt paid figures
Limited transparency about DMP eligibility requirements, creditor participation rates, or success metrics
Website does not specify typical timeframes for debt management plan approval or enrollment process
No clear information about what happens if clients cannot afford the consolidated DMP payment
best_for: Consumers with $5,000+ in unsecured debt seeking to negotiate lower interest rates through a formal DMP
Individuals facing foreclosure or seeking housing counseling for mortgage readiness and home purchase guidance
Consumers required to complete pre-bankruptcy or post-discharge counseling by the courts
People seeking free educational resources and budget planning tools without obligation to enroll in paid programs
diagnosis: American Financial Solutions is best for financially struggling consumers seeking legitimate nonprofit credit counseling, particularly those needing debt management plans, housing counseling, or required bankruptcy counseling. The main caveat is that while their nonprofit status and EOUST approval are legitimate credentials, the website provides limited transparency about fees, eligibility criteria, actual success rates, and the full debt management process—making it essential for prospective clients to speak directly with a counselor before committing.
services: Debt Management Plans (DMPs) with consolidated monthly payments and negotiated interest rate reductions
Certified credit counseling and financial situation analysis
Credit report review and credit score consultation
Student loan counseling and management guidance
Housing counseling for mortgage readiness and home purchase preparation
Foreclosure prevention counseling and lender negotiation assistance
Free online budgeting classes and financial education courses
Debt, credit, and budgeting calculators and tools
Financial education blog with Q&A resources
Confidential phone and online counselor consultations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
